case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1357 US CURRENCY

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1357 US CURRENCY ; $16775 U.S. CURRENCY; $1950 US CURRENCY; $450 US CURRENCY; ALL ASSETS IN CITIBANK ACCOUNT NO. 40033315330 IN THE AMOUNT OF $7801.06 U.S. CURRENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS AS TO CLAIMANT ZHAO LAN JU FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JU, ZHAO LAN
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO ZHAO LAN JU & JIMMY TANG FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JU, ZHAO LAN TANG, JIMMY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO ZHAO LAN JU & JIMMY TANG. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: ALL ASSETS IN CITIBANK ACCOUNT NO. 40033315330 IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,801.06 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY TONY TAMBURELLO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS JIMMY TANG AND ZHAO LAN JU. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,357.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $16,775.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

STIPULATION TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS AS TO CLAIMANT JIMMY TANG FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA TANG, JIMMY
ORDER TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS AS TO ZHAO LAN JU
